styles.name: Regular Slotted Container (RSC)
styles.description: All flaps same length; two inner flaps meet with a small gap. The most common shipper.

styles.name: RSC with same flaps meeting
styles.description: Similar to 0200; used interchangeably in some regions.

styles.name: Overlap Slotted Container (OSC)
styles.description: Outer flaps fully overlap, giving reinforcement on top/bottom.

styles.name: Full Overlap Slotted Container (FOL)
styles.description: All flaps are the full width of the box. Very strong top and bottom.

styles.name: Centre Special Slotted Container (CSSC)
styles.description: Inner and outer flaps meet in the middle on both sides.

styles.name: Two-piece Full Telescope Design Style (FTD)
styles.description: Separate top and bottom trays fully telescoping.

styles.name: Full Telescope Half Slotted (HSC lid + tray)
styles.description: Slotted base with a telescoping lid.

styles.name: Design Style Tray with Lid
styles.description: Tray with separate lid telescoping partially.

styles.name: One-Piece Folder (OPF)
styles.description: Single piece wraps around the product; also called book-fold.

styles.name: Five Panel Folder (FPF)
styles.description: Long rectangular items; fifth panel wraps around.

styles.name: Rigid Box (Bliss Box)
styles.description: Three-piece style with body and two ends; common in produce.

styles.name: Die-Cut Mailer
styles.description: Self-locking e-commerce mailer with tear strip optional.
